```python
class ReportGenerator:
    def __init__(self, analysis_result, interview_summary, technical_assessment, behavioral_assessment, strengths, weaknesses, final_recommendation, candidate_name="Candidate"):
        self.analysis_result = analysis_result
        self.interview_summary = interview_summary
        self.technical_assessment = technical_assessment
        self.behavioral_assessment = behavioral_assessment
        self.strengths = strengths
        self.weaknesses = weaknesses
        self.final_recommendation = final_recommendation
        self.candidate_name = candidate_name

    def generate_report(self, filename="candidate_evaluation_report.txt"):
        with open(filename, "w") as f:
            f.write(f"Candidate Evaluation Report: {self.candidate_name}\n")
            f.write("=========================================\n\n")

            f.write("I. Resume-Job Match Analysis\n")
            f.write("-----------------------------------------\n")
            f.write(f"Match Score: {self.analysis_result['match_score']:.2f}%\n")
            f.write(f"Resume Summary: {self.analysis_result['resume_summary']}\n")
            f.write(f"Job Keywords: {', '.join(self.analysis_result['job_keywords'])}\n")
            f.write(f"Resume Keywords: {', '.join(self.analysis_result['resume_keywords'])}\n\n")

            f.write("II. Interview Summary\n")
            f.write("-----------------------------------------\n")
            f.write(f"{self.interview_summary}\n\n")

            f.write("III. Technical Assessment\n")
            f.write("-----------------------------------------\n")
            f.write(f"{self.technical_assessment}\n\n")

            f.write("IV. Behavioral Assessment\n")
            f.write("-----------------------------------------\n")
            f.write(f"{self.behavioral_assessment}\n\n")

            f.write("V. Strengths\n")
            f.write("-----------------------------------------\n")
            f.write(f"{self.strengths}\n\n")

            f.write("VI. Weaknesses\n")
            f.write("-----------------------------------------\n")
            f.write(f"{self.weaknesses}\n\n")

            f.write("VII. Final Recommendation and Scoring Breakdown\n")
            f.write("-----------------------------------------\n")
            f.write(f"{self.final_recommendation}\n")

        return filename  # Return the filename of the generated report


if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Example Usage (mock data)
    analysis_result = {
        "match_score": 85.5,
        "resume_summary": "Strong match based on keywords and experience.",
        "job_keywords": ["python", "django", "rest api", "database", "agile"],
        "resume_keywords": ["python", "django", "rest api", "sql", "agile"]
    }

    interview_summary = "Candidate demonstrated good communication skills and a solid understanding of software development principles. Showed enthusiasm for the role."
    technical_assessment = "Candidate answered technical questions accurately, demonstrating a strong understanding of Python and Django. Performance on coding exercise was satisfactory."
    behavioral_assessment = "Candidate provided thoughtful responses to behavioral questions, highlighting teamwork and problem-solving skills."
    strengths = "Strong technical skills in Python/Django, good communication, team player."
    weaknesses = "Could improve on experience with large-scale systems. Lacks experience with specific cloud technologies."
    final_recommendation = "Recommend hiring. Overall score: 8.7/10. Strong technical foundation and good cultural fit."

    report_generator = ReportGenerator(analysis_result, interview_summary, technical_assessment, behavioral_assessment, strengths, weaknesses, final_recommendation, candidate_name="John Doe")
    report_file = report_generator.generate_report()
    print(f"Report generated: {report_file}")
```
